stemHtml: When segregated operations apply on two parallel runways, how will the two runways be used?

options.a: One runway will be used only for takeoffs, and the other runway will be used only for landings.
options.b: Both runways will alternate between takeoffs and landings.
options.c: One runway will be used predominantly for takeoffs, with landings permitted as needed.
options.d: Both runways will be used exclusively for arrivals.
